children.heading: Description of terms and provisions; prohibition
children.label: a Description of terms and provisions; prohibition
children.text: Any plan issued under this chapter may contain one or more of the terms and provisions described in this section, but except as provided in no others.section 4906 of this title

children.heading: Exemptions
children.label: b Exemptions
children.text: The plan may provide for the exemption, from the provisions of the plan, of watermelons used for nonfood uses, and authority for the Board to establish satisfactory safeguards against improper use of such exemption.

children.heading: Designation of different handler payment and reporting schedules for assessments
children.label: c Designation of different handler payment and reporting schedules for assessments
children.text: The plan may provide for the designation of different handler payment and reporting schedules with respect to assessments, as provided for in sections 4906 and 4908 of this title, to recognize differences in marketing practices and procedures used in different production areas.

children.heading: Advertising and sales promotion programs or projects
children.label: d Advertising and sales promotion programs or projects
children.text: The plan may provide for the establishment, issuance, effectuation, and administration of appropriate programs or projects for the advertising and other sales promotion of watermelons and for the disbursement of necessary funds for such purposes. Any such program or project shall be directed toward increasing the general demand for watermelons, and promotional activities shall comply with the provisions of .section 4906(g) of this title

children.heading: Marketing objectives of research and development projects and studies
children.label: e Marketing objectives of research and development projects and studies
children.text: The plan may provide for establishing and carrying out research and development projects and studies to the end that the marketing and use of watermelons may be encouraged, expanded, improved, or made more efficient, and for the disbursement of necessary funds for such purposes.

children.heading: Reserve funds; limitation
children.label: f Reserve funds; limitation
children.text: The plan may provide authority for the accumulation of reserve funds from assessments collected under this chapter, to permit an effective and continuous coordinated program of research, development, advertising, and promotion in years when watermelon production and assessment income may be reduced, except that the total reserve fund may not exceed the amount budgeted for two years operation.

children.heading: Foreign market sales
children.label: g Foreign market sales
children.text: The plan may provide for the use of funds from assessments collected under this chapter, with the approval of the Secretary, for the development and expansion of sales of watermelons in foreign markets.

children.heading: Other terms and conditions
children.label: h Other terms and conditions
children.text: The plan may contain terms and conditions incidental to and not inconsistent with the terms and conditions specified in this chapter and necessary to effectuate the other provisions of the plan.
